{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":12832},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7382888557903807294","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很好看，尤其是在描写吕布为了貂蝉跟孙悟空大战几百回合。但是薛宝钗的确太强了。要不是有诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台。这波m4六倍扫射必死，除此之外。我比较欣赏诸葛亮对花果山108只猴子说的一句话。“小伙一身傲骨别在你亮哥面前摆谱”表现出诸葛亮对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨。总而言之，此书情节有趣。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718966202,"group_id":"7363901972950305854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+eOmHlYihAOvm3bEuqV6FTe2O7M6igwj3dVyjDORxa6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1582a84249ef4f6c9333ba6721d7819d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618603&x-signature=lh7OUAuzgBUpcbS9BAZ20%2B48Hro%3D","user_id":"2012534743252027","user_name":"七七还来找你玩"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2012534743252027","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363901972950305854","book_info":{"abstract":"高阳穿越大乾，恰逢女帝登基，广聚天下人才，于是以一介毒士，毛遂自荐！
女帝：“当你亲手灭了仇家全家，看着满地尸体，却突然发现屋里还有一个孩子，你该如何是好？”
高阳：“臣会说记住我的脸，下次见面，我就不手下留情了，接着转身离开，再猛然回头，大笑一声，哈哈，小子我们又见面了！”
女帝：“……”
女帝：“眼下两军交战，我军却爆发瘟疫，人心涣散，有何良计？”
高阳：“我有一计，可用军中投石机，将沾染瘟疫的尸体，投入敌军阵营，亦或是将多余的尸体放入敌军上游的水源之中！”
女帝看着风轻云淡的高阳，嘴角一抽，“朕这是找了个活阎王啊！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/83d6fbe140a5a5a12743885ba536bebb","author":"星星子","author_id":"","book_id":"7363901972950305854","book_name":"天下道德倒退三百年，关我什么事","book_short_name":"史上最强毒士","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#502020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"41.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7364258842164609598","read_count":"411945","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3251460"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1510","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,女帝,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0c070dbb5bdf4efdec60eb3e96ee6327~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253721&x-signature=XUKNKm2QtyqQ2icHUVjiFIvC6bc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"21490448666","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"118"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2307,"forwarded_count":4,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":27149,"reply_count":91,"show_pv":493338},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type": {"comment":{"comment_id":"7379505567303254808","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，里面的许多毒计是真实发生的，可以查到，别人说的时候（比如范仲淹的荒政三策）也知道说的是什么。情节写的也不错，有很大的看头，个人觉得比较偏喜剧一点，不会看着看着就乏味了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718178961,"group_id":"7363901972950305854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人很懒，除了美貌与智慧什么都没留下～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NycbrwQ4iHA/WdFag0a+DPI=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/79520c7e66f7492b9c666881bdf169e2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617543&x-signature=DvQwT0t%2FRJYMLtdamS0q4yGFXBQ%3D","user_id":"329469009601331","user_name":"梅绾百合"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"329469009601331","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363901972950305854","book_info":{"abstract":"高阳穿越大乾，恰逢女帝登基，广聚天下人才，于是以一介毒士，毛遂自荐！
女帝：“当你亲手灭了仇家全家，看着满地尸体，却突然发现屋里还有一个孩子，你该如何是好？”
高阳：“臣会说记住我的脸，下次见面，我就不手下留情了，接着转身离开，再猛然回头，大笑一声，哈哈，小子我们又见面了！”
女帝：“……”
女帝：“眼下两军交战，我军却爆发瘟疫，人心涣散，有何良计？”
高阳：“我有一计，可用军中投石机，将沾染瘟疫的尸体，投入敌军阵营，亦或是将多余的尸体放入敌军上游的水源之中！”

,{"comment":{"comment_id":"7394397920541590334","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书可以说是定位优势的典范了。
主角塑造好的有很多，但没人写的比这本有脑子。
有脑子的主角有很多，但没人写的比这本更具感染力。
女帝关键词在番茄翻半小时都翻不完，但没有一本有这本有血有肉还可爱。
作者在若干个圆组成的集合中精确命中中央的空白，很精彩独到。
套路虽老，有用就行。加上精确的定位和标准化塑造，我甚至能称本书为中国内容工业化的真正萌芽。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721644823,"group_id":"7363901972950305854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9P8Ch4b5EZOEmo9QrHejr7nAdsi2FpdxMq1azIovmZd","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6dcc16bb011f42fa8cd11787c32b201b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617562&x-signature=sK4e0da1wExs3CPaaX%2BavuymUBc%3D","user_id":"2924354029752920","user_name":"吃葡萄的飞天橘猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2924354029752920","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363901972950305854","book_info":{"abstract":"高阳穿越大乾，恰逢女帝登基，广聚天下人才，于是以一介毒士，毛遂自荐！

高阳：“臣会说记住我的脸，下次见面，我就不手下留情了，接着转身离开，再猛然回头，大笑一声，哈哈，小子我们又见面了！”
女帝：“……”
女帝：“眼下两军交战，我军却爆发瘟疫，人心涣散，有何良计？”
高阳：“我有一计，可用军中投石机，将沾染瘟疫的尸体，投入敌军阵营，亦或是将多余的尸体放入敌军上游的水源之中！”

},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7379926729972073240","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"套路虽老，但确实好用。总体写的也还可以，缝合了不少历史上的阳谋、毒计之类的，堪称在世贾诩。文笔方面小瑕疵会有不少，剧情节奏把握的可以。套路文好就好在跳着看也完全不影响阅读体验，甚至自己就能脑补跳过部分，无聊打发时间看看还是蛮不错的[注意]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718276071,"group_id":"7363901972950305854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"事已至此，先吃饭吧-_-||","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwdi79Pj+rFVEI6rIutGmF4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/756d52558af7497c8a4ee8d212312a4c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624297&x-signature=FMJcOPsHTqmkE6NipWlvOrs67GI%3D","user_id":"281113750161400","user_name":"放开那只咸鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"281113750161400","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1740686035,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":16,"name":"423读书日","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c7865e1c9cc3ce8d4613e7f52dc0fd34","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/421c11bb754900f4bca176159b2e320a"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363901972950305854","book_info":{"abstract":"高阳穿越大乾，恰逢女帝登基，广聚天下人才，于是以一介毒士，毛遂自荐！
